# Content And Editorial Backlog

task: T-010
status: deferred beyond editorial-quality-gate MVP

## Deferred Skill: content-strategy-architect

Purpose:

- define editorial calendar, audience promise, topic priority, pillar pages, and content portfolio balance.

Dependencies:

- semantic core;
- information architecture;
- editorial-quality-gate findings.

Acceptance criteria:

- strategy separates news, explainers, blog, projects, and topics;
- strategy preserves one-brief-plus-one-longform model;
- strategy defines what not to publish;
- strategy includes freshness and update policy.

## Deferred Skill: translation-localization-seo

Purpose:

- design localized publication rules for EN/RU and future languages without literal low-quality translation.

Dependencies:

- semantic core by language;
- URL/hreflang model;
- editorial-quality-gate translation findings.

Acceptance criteria:

- target-language audience and tone are defined;
- terminology glossary exists;
- translation QA catches meaning drift;
- localized titles/meta are not direct machine copies when they read poorly.

## Deferred Skill: content-decay-monitor

Purpose:

- detect outdated articles, broken source links, changed product names, and stale search intent.

Dependencies:

- sitemap/feed access;
- content inventory;
- update policy;
- optional analytics/Search Console access.

Acceptance criteria:

- flags pages by age, topic volatility, broken links, and changed source evidence;
- separates "needs update" from "archive/noindex";
- records date checked and evidence.
